service.name: Google Cloud Vision API
service.description_for_ai: Analyze images with Google AI. Detect objects, faces, text (OCR), logos, landmarks, explicit content, colors. Very accurate OCR for documents. 1000 units free/month.

auth.cost: Free: 1000 units/month. Then $1.50/1000 for labels, $3.50/1000 for OCR

capabilities.description_for_ai: Detect labels, objects, faces, text (OCR), logos, landmarks, explicit content, colors in an image. Send base64 or GCS URI.

requests.description: [{image: {content: BASE64 or source: {imageUri: 'gs://...'}}, features: [{type: LABEL_DETECTION, maxResults: 10}, {type: TEXT_DETECTION}, {type: FACE_DETECTION}, {type: OBJECT_LOCALIZATION}]}]

capabilities.description_for_ai: Extract all text from an image (OCR). Returns raw text and structured document with bounding boxes per word.

requests.description: [{image: {content: BASE64}, features: [{type: DOCUMENT_TEXT_DETECTION}]}] — use DOCUMENT_TEXT_DETECTION for structured docs, TEXT_DETECTION for simple text

capabilities.description_for_ai: Detect explicit content (adult, violent, medical, spoof, racy) in images. Returns likelihood scores for content moderation.
Extract dominant colors and image color profile. Returns color palette with percentage and hex values.

requests.description: [{image: {content: BASE64}, features: [{type: IMAGE_PROPERTIES}, {type: LANDMARK_DETECTION}, {type: LOGO_DETECTION}]}] — combine multiple features in one call

agent_hints.feature_types: LABEL_DETECTION=general labels, TEXT_DETECTION=OCR, DOCUMENT_TEXT_DETECTION=structured OCR, FACE_DETECTION=faces, OBJECT_LOCALIZATION=bounding boxes, LOGO_DETECTION=brand logos, LANDMARK_DETECTION=places, SAFE_SEARCH_DETECTION=explicit content
agent_hints.vs_gemini: For complex image understanding use Gemini Vision. For specific tasks (OCR, logos, explicit detection) use Vision API.
